Banner.p: ✨ Caring massages for women, expectant mothers, babies, children and teenagers. A gentle space to take care of yourself at every stage of life. ✨

Hero.h1: Wellness massage for women, children and families in Présilly
Hero.p_1: At Haumana Bien-Être, I offer personalized wellness massages for women, children and families, through a psycho-corporal and energetic approach.
Hero.p_2: Each relaxing massage session is designed to relieve muscle tension, reduce stress and promote deep relaxation of both body and mind. My professional massages are tailored to the needs of every woman, every child and every family, offering a true moment of relaxation, release and lasting well-being.
Hero.p_3: Treat yourself to a stress-relief massage, a gentle massage for children, or a family wellness massage in a caring and safe environment.
Hero.span: Through touch and words, I help everyone reconnect with their body, soothe their emotions and reveal their inner well-being.

About.note: I support women and children in restoring balance to what has been disrupted through the body and emotions, using the power of words combined with wellness massage.

Description.p_1: At Haumana Bien-Être, each session is a personalized pause where words and touch meet to restore balance between body and emotions. A moment to refocus, release and reconnect with your inner energy.
Description.p_2: Through caring listening and intuitive gestures, each treatment becomes a dialogue between body and mind. Everything is designed so you feel welcomed, understood and deeply soothed.
Description.p_3: Inspired by nature and cultures around the world, the Haumana universe invites you on an inner journey. Soft lighting and delicate scents create a warm atmosphere, perfect for letting go.

Benefits.intro: Discover our professional massage treatments and makeup services, dedicated to the well-being of women and babies. Whether you are looking for a moment of deep relaxation, maternity-adapted care, or natural makeup to enhance your beauty, we offer personalized services delivered with gentleness and expertise.
Benefits.description_1: Treat yourself to a moment of deep relaxation with our massages dedicated to women. Our treatments are designed to release tension, soothe stress and gently rebalance the body. Each massage is personalized to your needs for a complete and rejuvenating wellness experience.
Benefits.description_2: A gentle treatment dedicated to your baby’s well-being and comfort. Our baby massages promote relaxation, better sleep and strengthen the parent-child bond. A tender and safe moment, adapted to little ones and delivered with a respectful and caring approach.
Benefits.description_3: Tailor-made packages to extend your relaxation experience. Enjoy a complete journey combining several treatments at a preferential rate. Perfect for a special moment or as an unforgettable wellness gift.
Benefits.description_4: Enhance your natural beauty with professional makeup tailored to every occasion. Natural makeup, event makeup or personalized beauty looks — we reveal your glow with elegance and refinement.

Reviews.h2: What our clients say about us
Reviews.h3: Discover how our clients in Présilly experience Haumana Bien-Être and enjoy our treatments

Cta.h2: Transform your day into a moment of softness
Cta.p: Relaxing massage or tailored makeup, I am here to help you feel beautiful and relaxed. Easily book your session and let me take care of you.

brand.description: Haumana Bien-Être – Personalized wellness massages for women, children and families, combining a psycho-corporal approach with deep relaxation.
